# teams2 app auth oauth list

List OAuth connections on an Azure bot

## Usage

```
teams2 app auth oauth list [appId] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `appId` | App ID | No |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--json` | [OPTIONAL] Output as JSON |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
